def initialize(context):
    g.etf_pool = ['510300.XSHG', '510500.XSHG', '159915.XSHE']
    log.info('初始化ETF轮动策略')
    run_monthly(rebalance, 1, time='open')

def rebalance(context):
    # ETF动量策略
    for etf in g.etf_pool:
        current = get_current_data(etf)
        if not current.paused:
            order_target_value(etf, context.portfolio.total_value / len(g.etf_pool))
